description: FOR HDLC REVIEW ONLY: Renovation of an existing covered parking garage to support outdoor dining for neighboring restaurant (under separate permit). Exterior cladding and screening is proposed replaced in kind except for one area of metal cladding proposed to be replaced with polycarbonate sheet material. The combination asbestos and polycarbonate roofing will be removed and replaced with metal roofing including skylight panels. A new four story stair core is proposed for the rear of the property providing egress and access to an adjacent property easement for occupants of both 744 and 748 Camp.
Carry out pizza restaurant. *After the fact- includes building addition

description: New 10,000 S.F. Metal Recycling Center will be a 100' x 100' pre-engineered metal building with metal roof. Project includes site work for parking areas, perimeter loop road, two truck scales, concrete paving for material storage / staging, site lighting on approximately 11.28 acre site. Sitework to include a dry detention area for stormwater, pervious paving at parking stalls, solid metal panel perimeter fencing at 7'-0" tall. The warehouse portion of the building will be unconditioned space with R19 at walls. The office area will be air-conditioned with R9.8 continuous insulation per ASHRAE 90.1 - 2019.
We will be constructing a 195' Monopole cell tower. We will run conduit from the ROW to the site located in the rear of the property.
